query_text: Show moments where the defending block shifts toward the ball side before a wide entry.
description: Semantic expression for the reviewed ball-side block-shift recipe. It proves that a reviewed recipe can be represented as Football Query Normal Form and lowered through the existing runtime.

scope.summary: Selected matches, both halves, from the requested attacking-team perspective.

anchor.summary: Possession moments that can be evaluated for ball-side defensive displacement and wide-entry timing.

bind.summary: Attacking team, defending team, ball position, defensive outfield unit, and field-side regions.

measure.summary: Measure signed lateral defensive shift, ball-side orientation, wide-entry timing, and quality gates.

match.summary: Require the displacement, timing, and persistence predicates declared by the reviewed profile.

outcome.summary: Classify a moment as BALL_SIDE_BLOCK_SHIFT when all reviewed predicates pass.

judge.summary: Apply the reviewed ball-side block-shift definition and its declared thresholds.

return.summary: Return matched moments with declared evidence, predicate traces, uncertainty, and replay coordinates.
